sections.sectionTitle: Pasian in Gitlohnate A Thudon Lohna Hangin Job Phun

verses.text: “Pasian in bang hangin a thukhen ni ding sehlo a, ama nasemte thutang ahihna a lah ni ding sehlo ahi hiam
“Mihingte in leitang zaipi a ngah theihna dingun gisuangte khinsim uh a, tuute gu-in amau' tuuhonte tawh khawi khawm uh hi
Mi tagahte' la neihsunte guksak uh a, meigong numei in a leiba a loh khit dong a bawngtal a matsak uh hi
Mizawngte' ngah theih dingte khaktan uh a, mizawngte notkhia ahih manun amaute lau-in a bucip uh hi
“Tua ahih manin gamlaka om la bangin gam keu sungah a an ding uh zongtawm uh a, a tate uh an ding koimahah mu zolo uh hi
Midangte' lo sungah anlak na sem uh a, migilote' leenggui lo-ah leenggah lo-in a om uh hi
Zanin puan silhloin lum uh a, khuadampi lakah silh ding neiloin om uh hi
Mualtung gam panin a hong zu guahtui in amaute kawtciimsak a, suangpi pang peuh beelin a toncip uh hi
“Migilote in pa nei nawnlo naupangte sila-in nei uh a, mizawngte' tate leiba tangin a la uh hi
Tua mizawngte in puan silhloin na sem uh a, gilkialpi mahin anlak na a sem uh hi
A thau ngahna dingin oliv gahte gawi-in leenggahzu ngahna dingin leenggahte cil napi-in, gilkial dangtakin ki-omsak hi
Khuapi sungah a liam leh a si kuante' kikona kiza napi-in Pasian in amau' thungetnate donlo hi
“Sun khuavak a nial, tua khuavak thuzia a theilo, khuavak lampi a pelh mi pawlkhat om hi
A zawng a cimawhte a thatlum dingin khuavak ma-in mi thatpa kuankhia a, zan khuamial hun sungin mite' na a guksak hi
Numei tunga a mawh mipa in khuamial ding ngakin om a, mite' theihloh dingin ama meel a seel hi
Gutate in sun sungin a ciamtehsa teng zanin a inn luh uh a, sun sung bu-in khuavak a peel uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh zan khuamial pen amaute khempeuh-a' dingin zing khuavak bang hi a, zan khuamial lauhuai sung nuam a sa uh hi
“Tua bang migilo peuhpeuh tuikhang in taii a, ama neih leitangte Pasian in samsia a, tua leenggui lote-ah nasemin kikuan nawnlo hi
Nisat hun leh khuakhal hunin vukkhalte a man'than' bangin mihingte' gamsung panin mawhnei mi a mangthang hi
Amah kiphawkkha nawnlo a, ama nu nangawn in zong a mangngilh ta hi. Thante in amah netum a, amah maimang ta hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh tua bang mite, numei taciingte' neihsa tawh a kivak uh hi a, meigongte' phattuamna ding bangmah bawllo uh hi
Pasian in a thahatna tawh mi vangliante susia a, amah a gamtat ciangin migilopa a si pah hi
Pasian in a lungnuamin amah nungtasak a, ahi zongin Pasian in amah encik tawntung hi
Migilopa tomkha sung a liat hangin kiak bangin vulkik pah a, a kisattan ankung bangin a keu pah hi
Hih thu kua in nialzo ding na hi uh hiam? Ka thugennate manlo hi, ci-in kei langah hong pangin ka thugente hong selzo ding kua om na hi uh hiam?” a ci hi.
